task_completion.description: Open DreamPlan Home Design Software and load the sample house.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan software interface is visible with a 3D or 2D house model loaded.

task_completion.description: Place a bathtub in the bathroom area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model of a bathtub is visible within a room designated as the bathroom.

task_completion.description: Place a toilet in the bathroom area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model of a toilet is visible within the bathroom area.

task_completion.description: Place a vanity or sink in the bathroom area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D model of a sink or vanity is visible within the bathroom area.

task_completion.description: Export the final 3D view of the bathroom as a PNG image to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bathroom_design.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or file explorer window showing the export or save process of a PNG image to the specified path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bathroom_design.png', with a 3D view of the bathroom.
A save dialog, progress bar, or confirmation message indicating the DreamPlan project file is being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the DreamPlan GUI to place items and export the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, drag-and-drop actions, and menu selections within the DreamPlan software, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The placed items are genuine 3D models from the software's library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bathtub, toilet, and sink appear as rendered 3D objects consistent with the software's graphics, not as pasted 2D images or text placeholders.

integrity.description: The export process was performed through the software's features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the software's built-in export or print-to-image functionality, rather than just renaming an existing file or using an external screenshot tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan Home Design Software (by NCH Software) running on Windows 11 is used for this task. The software has built-in 3D models for 'Bathtub', 'Toilet', and 'Sink/Vanity' (or 'Bathroom Sink'). The expected output path for the exported PNG is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bathroom_design.png.
